refactorings_applied: DRY: Extracted ~55 lines of duplicated session status detection logic from worktrees/route.ts and worktrees/[id]/route.ts into src/lib/worktree-status-helper.ts (detectWorktreeSessionStatus())
Simplified redundant truthiness check: output && output.length > 0 to output.length > 0 in tmux-capture-cache.ts and cli-session.ts (output is always string, never null/undefined)
Removed unused imports from both route files (CLIToolManager, CLI_TOOL_IDS, captureSessionOutput, detectSessionStatus, OPENCODE_PANE_HEIGHT, isSessionHealthy)

review_notes.tmux_capture_cache_quality: Code quality is high. JSDoc and security annotations (SEC4-001, SEC4-002, SEC4-006, SEC4-007) are well-documented. Singleflight pattern in getOrFetchCapture() is correctly implemented with proper inflight cleanup in finally block.
review_notes.captureSessionOutputFresh_error_handling: DA3-005 TOCTOU safety is properly implemented: invalidateCache() is called on error to prevent stale cache from masking session failure.
review_notes.cache_invalidation_consistency: Cache invalidation hooks are consistently placed at all mutation points: sendPromptAnswer (prompt-answer-sender.ts line 111), detectAndRespondToPrompt (auto-yes-manager.ts line 620 in finally block), sendMessageToClaude (claude-session.ts line 732), stopClaudeSession (claude-session.ts line 792), and captureSessionOutputFresh error path (cli-session.ts line 128).
review_notes.security_annotations: SEC4-001 (trust boundary), SEC4-002 (lazy/full eviction), SEC4-006 (debug logging) are appropriately documented in tmux-capture-cache.ts module header and function JSDoc.

message: Refactoring completed. Primary improvement: extracted duplicated session status detection logic (~55 lines x 2) into shared worktree-status-helper.ts. All 4471 unit tests pass. TypeScript and ESLint: 0 errors.
